title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!
